Home Adventure Retreat School Trips Property Contact Plan Your Trip
For yoga teachers, wellness coaches & guides

Your retreat.
Our land.

Bring your group, your curriculum, your energy.
We provide the space, and nothing else gets in the way.

Who this is for

You run the program. We host the group.

Mitraay is a private venue, not a retreat company. We don't design or lead programs. We give facilitators a beautiful, distraction-free setting where their work can land differently.

Wellness Retreats

Yoga teachers, somatic practitioners, breathwork facilitators: the bamboo pavilion, the river, and the morning mist create conditions for deep work.

Morning yoga, silent meals, outdoor sessions, healing baths in the river.

Spiritual Retreats

Meditation leaders, spiritual guides, devotional groups: the silence here is real. No roads. No noise. The Sahyadri holds the space.

Satsang, mantra practice, contemplative walks, fasting-friendly vegetarian food.

Group Getaways

Father-daughter trips, women's circles, close-knit friend groups: Mitraay is ideal when the connection between people matters more than the itinerary.

River time, farm mornings, bonfires, cooking together, long uninterrupted dinners.

What's included

The complete container for your group.

Private exclusive property

One group at a time. No strangers, no shared spaces with other guests.

Accommodation for 22–28

Cottages, dormitories, and a treehouse across the property.

Open bamboo pavilion

A large open-sided structure for sessions, movement, and circle work.

Working farm

Paddy fields, seasonal crops, and morning farm walks if your group wants them.

River access

The river runs along the property. Swimming, sitting, bathing. It's there.

Vegetarian meals

Three simple, sattvic, farm-fresh meals each day, included for all guests.

Pavilion with sound system & large TV

The bamboo pavilion is equipped with a sound system and large TV for presentations, screenings, and group sessions.

Karaoke on request

Karaoke system available for group evenings — a popular close to a long retreat day.

Bonfire area

A dedicated bonfire space for evening circles, storytelling, and star-gazing.

Meals are vegetarian and grown on the property, timed around your program.

For the facilitator

The treehouse is yours.

When you bring your group here, the treehouse is reserved for you: the teacher, guide, or organiser. A private canopy space above the farm, reached by a stone-path walkway, with the best sunrise on the property.

A place to prepare, rest, and hold the energy of your group, separate from the dormitories and cottages where your participants stay.

A day at Mitraay

You set the schedule.
We set the stage.

There's no fixed program here. You decide how each day flows. Below is what the land naturally offers. Use as much or as little as your retreat calls for.

Morning

Pavilion sessions, sunrise river baths, silent farm walks, chai on the terrace

Afternoon

Deep practice sessions, integration time, cooking together, farm exploration

Evening

Sunset circles, community bonfire, star-gazing, unstructured group time

Ready to bring your group here?

Your retreat. Our land.

Tell us your dates, group size, and the kind of retreat you run. We'll confirm availability and answer your questions.

Enquire About Hiring the Venue
Mitraay

A purposeful farm retreat near Raigad Fort, Raigad, Maharashtra. Built for groups who want more than a getaway.

A project by Vedbhoomi Eco Village
